display.name: Crows at the Barrow Stones
display.short_description: The crows have found a satchel under the barrow markers and are taking turns tearing at the straps.

choices.label: Scatter them off and grab the coin roll
choices.summary: The birds lift in a black wave and leave just enough time to snatch the purse before they settle again.

choices.label: Pull the waxed packet out instead
choices.summary: The packet stayed dry under the satchel and still smells like trail herbs when you break the cord.
